pi_items.metadata_value: Intelligence Analyst - creating isolated research environments
pi_items.verified_value: Intelligence Analyst - creating isolated research environments
pi_items.source: OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) tools and techniques are legitimate, documented activities used by intelligence analysts, cybersecurity professionals, law enforcement, and security researchers. Creating isolated browser profiles for research is a standard security practice

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Microsoft Edge browser profile named 'OSINT-Research' with privacy configurations and startup URLs pointing to osintframework.com and shodan.io. Both are real, publicly accessible websites: osintframework.com is a legitimate OSINT resource directory offering free intelligence-gathering tools, and shodan.io is a real search engine for Internet-connected devices widely used by security professionals. The configuration report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/osint_profile_config.txt. The task context of an intelligence analyst creating isolated research environments is accurate and reflects legitimate cybersecurity and OSINT research practices.
